reviews.comment:
Siempre cargo en ACA.
Es garantía de buen combustible y en muchos lados de buena atención.
NO atienden bien en Zapala y 25 de Mayo entre otras.
Deberían hacer cursos OBLIGATORIOS de atención al cliente; ayuda a la empresa y le da currículum al vendedor.

(Translated by Google)
I always fill up at ACA.
It's a guarantee of good fuel and, in many places, good service.
The service is NOT good in Zapala and 25 de Mayo, among other locations.
They should make customer service training MANDATORY; it helps the company and improves the salesperson's resume.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVaUltWDV3RRAB

reviews.comment:
En Esta estación siempre la atención es lenta, y muchas veces cierran surtidores y la espera es bastante larga, si estás apurado no te detengas acá.

(Translated by Google)
At this station, service is always slow, and they often close pumps and the wait is quite long; if you're in a hurry, don't stop here.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURrdF91elVnEAE
